title: Elymus kronokensis
taxonomy: Elymus kronokensis is a species of the Elymus genus of true grasses in the family Poaceae. Elymus kronokensis is native to the mountainous regions of central Asia, including China and Kazakhstan. The classification of Elymus kronokensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Clade: Commelinids, Order: Poales, Family: Poaceae, Subfamily: Pooideae, Tribe: Triticeae, Genus: Elymus, Species: E. kronokensis. This species is further divided into two subspecies: Elymus kronokensis subsp. kronokensis and Elymus kronokensis subsp. tianschanicus.
